title: PF_Number Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub PF_Number (PartName As String) As Integer
parameters:
PartName	Character string representing the part
		 name
description: Gets a part ID from a part name.
notes:
Returns −1 if the corresponding part name does not exist.

If multiple parts with the same name exist, the part with the smallest ID will be retrieved.

PF_Number Example

VB
examples:
Dim part1ID As Integer
Part1ID = m_spel.PF_Number("Part1")
